title: microsorum aurantiacum
intro: Microsorum aurantiacum, also known as Golden Pothos or Ceylonese Pothos, is a type of flowering plant in the Arum family, native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. In herbal preparations, Microsorum aurantiacum is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be dried and used in infusions or added to ointments and creams for topical application.
